title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Samsung India Electronics
jsonLd.description:
We at Samsung India Electronics are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
